svg.text: separate pattern grammars selected by audio fingerprint

g.desc: Reversible Sound Form Engine. A 100-pass audio-fingerprint morphology search chooses one of five macro forms: cloth-field, pressure-map, memory-orbit, wave-strata, or impact-fracture. Different songs therefore change the large structure, not only the line texture. Restoration PCM is added as pcm_reversible_data on export.

Reversible Sound Form Engine. A 100-pass audio-fingerprint morphology search chooses one of five macro forms: cloth-field, pressure-map, memory-orbit, wave-strata, or impact-fracture. Different songs therefore change the large structure, not only the line texture. Restoration PCM is added as pcm_reversible_data on export.

Different songs therefore change the large structure, not only the line texture. Restoration PCM is added as pcm_reversible_data on export.
